content.problemStatement:
Consider NNN families (numbered 000 through N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1). Each year, each family gives gifts to all other families based on the gifts they received in the previous year. Let's say that in some year, family iii received gifts with value aia_iai‚Äč (from all families in total). Then, for each valid jjj, the value of the gifts given by family iii to family jjj in the next year is G(i,j)‚čÖaiG(i, j) \cdot a_iG(i,j)‚čÖai‚Äč, where G(i,j)=2‚čÖ(i‚ą®j)‚ąí(i+j)G(i, j) = 2 \cdot (i \vee j) - (i+j)G(i,j)=2‚čÖ(i‚ą®j)‚ąí(i+j); note that ‚ą®\vee‚ą® denotes bitwise OR.

For each valid iii, you are given the total value of gifts received by family iii in the year 000. Find the total values of gifts received by each family in the year KKK. Since these values can be very large, compute them modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers a0,a1,‚Ä¶,aN‚ąí1a_0, a_1, \ldots, a_{N-1}a0‚Äč,a1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,aN‚ąí1‚Äč. For each valid iii, aia_iai‚Äč denotes the total value of gifts received by family iii in the year 000.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing NNN integers. For each iii (0‚Č§i<N0 \le i \lt N0‚Č§i<N), the i+1i+1i+1-th of these integers should be the total value of gifts received by family iii in the year KKK, modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
